texto: The desire to be desire-less is but another desire. The thought that, because this desire purports to be spiritual, it is superior to more mundane desires shows how skilled the mind is at justifying any desire it is attached to.
explicacao: Citação de Joel Kramer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The desire to be desire-less is but another desire. The thought that, because this desire purport…” articula reflexao, desire, another em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
